zh.lifeSummary: Gerard de Créquy是Bouchard DE CREQUY和Richilde DE SAINT POL的兒子，於大約1080年出生。他於1125年與Yolande Hainaut結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1125年9月之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gerard de Créquy是Bouchard DE CREQUY和Richilde DE SAINT POL的儿子，于大约1080年出生。他于1125年与Yolande Hainaut结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1125年9月之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Créquy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucienne, Renold, Romain.  Spanish Alejandro, Eduardo, Beatriz, Juana, Mario, Porfirio.

Altered form of northern French Crequi: variant of Créquy, a habitational name from Créquy, a place in Pas-de-Calais, so named from Kreko, a personal name of ancient Germanic origin, + the suffix -iacum.

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

en.lifeSummary: Gerard de Créquy was born about 1080 as the son of Bouchard DE CREQUY and Richilde DE SAINT POL. He married Yolande Hainaut in 1125. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died after September 1125.

fr.lifeSummary: Gerard de Créquy est né environ 1080, fils de Bouchard DE CREQUY et Richilde DE SAINT POL. Il a épousé Yolande Hainaut en 1125. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après septembre 1125.

de.lifeSummary: Gerard de Créquy wurde um 1080, als Sohn von Bouchard DE CREQUY und Richilde DE SAINT POL geboren. Er hat 1125 Yolande Hainaut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach September 1125.

it.lifeSummary: Gerard de Créquy è nato il circa 1080 come figlio di Bouchard DE CREQUY e Richilde DE SAINT POL. Lui sposato Yolande Hainaut nel 1125. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il settembre 1125.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerard de Créquyは約1080年にBouchard DE CREQUYとRichilde DE SAINT POLの息子として生まれた。1125年にYolande Hainautと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1125年9月以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerard de Créquy(은)는 대략 1080년 Bouchard DE CREQUY(와)과 Richilde DE SAINT POL의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1125년 Yolande Hainaut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1125년 9월 이후 사망했다.

mn.aproximadamente 1080–após setembro de 11: ойролцоогоор 1080 он–1125 оны Есдүгээр сараас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Gerard de Créquy nasceu aproximadamente 1080 filho de Bouchard DE CREQUY e Richilde DE SAINT POL. Ele casou-se com Yolande Hainaut em 1125. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após setembro de 1125.

ru.lifeSummary: Gerard de Créquy родился около 1080 г. Его родителей звали Bouchard DE CREQUY и Richilde DE SAINT POL. Он женился на женщине по имени Yolande Hainaut в 1125 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер после сентябрь 1125 г.

sm.aproximadamente 1080–após setembro de 11: e tusa o le 1080–ina ua ma'ea le Setema 1125

es.lifeSummary: Gerard de Créquy nació aproximadamente 1080 como hijo de Bouchard DE CREQUY y Richilde DE SAINT POL. Se casó con Yolande Hainaut en 1125. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió después de septiembre de 1125.
